@@ -165,9 +165,9 @@
 and
 .Sx EXAMPLES
 below.
-.It Fl h Cm size
+.It Fl h Ar size
 Set the size of the history (scrollback) buffer to
-.Cm size
+.Ar size
 lines.
 .It Fl i Cm adapter
 Shows info about the current video adapter.
